title: Erasmus+ Anlaşması
content:
Erasmus+ Anlaşması

The Department of Economics has signed its third Erasmus+ Bilateral Agreement with the Department of Economics at the University of Lodz in Poland. According to this agreement every year the Department of Economics can send and receive two BA and two MA students for one semester. The European Commission offers a monthly grant of 300€ to students from Istanbul 29 Mayis University to study in Poland.
